templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! You can learn more and sign up here https://bluemercury.com/pages/vendor-submissions

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at 1-800-355-6000 or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/bluemercury/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/bluemercury/

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content:
The best way to handle this is to email us directly at team@bluemercury.com. Our team is happy to help!

Please note that orders that are already being prepared for shipment or are on their way cannot be canceled or modified. If you wish to cancel such an order, you will need to wait until you receive the package and then use the prepaid return label to return the order, or take it to a Bluemercury store.

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders for BlueRewards Members and over $100 for non-members. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us at a store near you here: https://bluemercury.com/apps/store-locator

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://bluemercury.com/pages/shipping-returns-exchanges and you can initiate your return here https://bluemercury.com/pages/returns

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at team@bluemercury.com or give us a call at 1-800-355-6000. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that but if it helps, you can check out our current offers and promos here: https://bluemercury.com/pages/offers-promotions

templates.name: Order status/order tracking
templates.content: You can use our convenient online tool to see the latest updates on your order: https://bluemercury.com/pages/track-your-order

templates.name: Affiliate program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! You can learn more and sign up here https://bluemercury.com/pages/bluemercury-affiliate-program

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: We usually ship via USPS and once shipped it will take 7-10 business days domestically. We also have an expedited shipping option available.

templates.name: Rewards
templates.content: We have a rewards program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here - https://bluemercury.com/pages/bluerewards

templates.name: What should I do if my order is canceled as fraudulent?
templates.content: If your order was canceled and flagged as fraudulent, don't worry! Our system occasionally flags orders to protect our customers, but after a quick review, your account will be authorized to make purchases. You simply need to repurchase the item using the same information you initially provided.

templates.name: Do you offer financing?
templates.content: Yes, we do! You can split your purchase into four interest-free payments with Klarna. See how it works here https://bluemercury.com/pages/klarna
